title: BAMi Intermediate Slide Schema
description: Bridge between content intent and both renderers (Slidev Branch A, python-pptx Branch B). Serves as the JSON-first intermediate representation that decouples content from presentation.

schema_version.description: Semver string. Bump major on breaking changes (renderers reject unknown versions via const).

title.description: Deck title (displayed in browser tab / metadata)

type.description: Maps directly to Slidev frontmatter layout:. cover/closing use props for chrome slots; content uses title + components/body.

title.description: Content slide title (required on type=content). Maps to the black title bar chrome slot.

props.description: Chrome slot values for cover/closing. Keys match design_tokens.yaml slot names 1:1. For cover: eyebrow, kicker, hero, subtitle, steps[]. For closing: eyebrow, hero, subtitle, step_numbers[], step_titles[], step_bodies[], contact.

components.description: Ordered list of Slidev Vue component invocations. Rendered in sequence after body.

body.description: Raw Markdown body (escape hatch for simple slides). Rendered before components.

section.description: Teal-colored section label (e.g. 'THE CONTEXT'). Rendered above subheading in body area. Template pattern.

subheading.description: Dark bold heading below section label (e.g. 'Copilot is already in your tenant...').

bodytext.description: Body paragraph below subheading (e.g. 'What is missing is an agile way to assess...').

component.description: PascalCase Vue component name (e.g. 'TierPricingCards'). Must be registered in schemas/components/registry.json.

props.description: Component props. Schema validates structure only (object type). Semantic validation (required props, types) happens via Component Registry (schemas/components/) at the reviewer stage.
